mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (name, phone, gender, birth_date, status, join_date, membership_end, memo) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{status}, #{joinDate}, #{membershipEnd}, #{memo})
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_freeze (member_id, freeze_start, freeze_end, reason) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{freezeStart}, #{freezeEnd}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member_freeze WHERE member_id=#{memberId} ORDER BY freeze_start DESC
SELECT ms.*, p.name AS product_name FROM membership ms LEFT JOIN product p ON ms.product_id = p.id WHERE ms.member_id=#{memberId} ORDER BY ms.start_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO membership (member_id, product_id, type, start_date, end_date, price, memo) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{productId}, #{type}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{price}, #{memo})
